'''zhagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:junglewards|junglewards]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-g-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:junglewards|junglewards]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zhagate|zhagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhagatesher|zhagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhagatesherĂ«m|zhagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhagatero|zhagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhagateshĂ«|zhagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhagateshĂ«m|zhagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhagatero|gokizhagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhagateshĂ«|gokizhagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhagateshĂ«m|gokizhagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhagankerom|gozhagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhagankeshĂ«|gozhagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhagankeshĂ«m|gozhagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhagankeya|gozhagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhagaterom|zhagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhagatemu|zhagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhagateya|zhagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhagaterom|gokizhagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhagatemu|gokizhagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhagateya|gokizhagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhagagate|zhagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhagagatesher|zhagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhagagatesherĂ«m|zhagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhagagatero|zhagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhagagateshĂ«|zhagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhagagateshĂ«m|zhagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhagagatero|gokizhagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhagagateshĂ«|gokizhagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhagagateshĂ«m|gokizhagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhagagankerom|gozhagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhagagankeshĂ«|gozhagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhagagankeshĂ«m|gozhagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhagagankeya|gozhagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhagagaterom|zhagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhagagatemu|zhagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhagagateya|zhagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhagagaterom|gokizhagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhagagatemu|gokizhagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhagagateya|gokizhagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhĂŠgĂŠte|zhĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhĂŠgĂŠtesher|zhĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|zhĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠgĂŠtero|zhĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|zhĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|zhĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠgĂŠtero|gokizhĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokizhĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizhĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhĂŠgĂŠnkerom|gozhĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozhĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozhĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhĂŠgĂŠnkeya|gozhĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhĂŠgĂŠterom|zhĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhĂŠgĂŠtemu|zhĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhĂŠgĂŠteya|zhĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠgĂŠterom|gokizhĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokizhĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhĂŠgĂŠteya|gokizhĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhafgafte|zhafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zhafgaftesher|zhafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafgaftesherĂ«m|zhafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafgaftero|zhafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhafgafteshĂ«|zhafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafgafteshĂ«m|zhafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafgaftero|gokizhafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhafgafteshĂ«|gokizhafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafgafteshĂ«m|gokizhafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozhafgafnkerom|gozhafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhafgafnkeshĂ«|gozhafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhafgafnkeshĂ«m|gozhafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozhafgafnkeya|gozhafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zhafgafterom|zhafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhafgaftemu|zhafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zhafgafteya|zhafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizhafgafterom|gokizhafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhafgaftemu|gokizhafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizhafgafteya|gokizhafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
